stories.title: Cubs 11, Tigers 2 — Peterson Dominates in Game 2 Bounce-Back

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Cubs 11, Tigers 2.

David Peterson went 6⅔ scoreless innings after entering with a 6.45 ERA. Six runs in the first off Framber Valdez. PCA reached five times. Conforto put it away with a pinch-hit 2-run homer.

Monday hurt. Tuesday answered. 57-44.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: David Peterson's Bounce-Back + Conforto's Pinch-Hit Streak

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
David Peterson walked in with a 6.45 ERA and walked out with 6⅔ scoreless innings.

Michael Conforto has 4 pinch-hit homers this season. Four. That's a franchise-level number by any measure.

Depth wins series. The Cubs are proving it.

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs

stories.title: Thornton Day-to-Day — No Fracture, IL Bullet Dodged

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Trent Thornton update: no fractures.

CT scan clean after Monday's 108.9 mph comebacker. He played catch Tuesday, tests off a mound today, and Thursday's off-day buys extra time.

The Cubs may dodge another IL stint — a big deal right now.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Trade Deadline: Sonny Gray Getting Complicated

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Cubs' dream deadline target just got complicated.

Sonny Gray is 12-1 with a 2.48 ERA — and the Red Sox have gone from sellers to buyers. Gray may not move.

Joe Ryan still makes sense. 12 days to August 3. Hoyer can't afford to wait this one out.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Game 3 Tonight — Rea vs. Montero, Series on the Line, 7:10 PM CT

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Series finale. Wrigley Field. Tonight.

Colin Rea (7-6, 4.74 ERA) faces Keider Montero (6-5, 3.22 ERA) at 7:10 PM CT. Montero's been quietly solid — this isn't a gimme.

Cubs tied the series 1-1 with an 11-run statement. Time to close it out.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Wild Card Watch — 57-44, 23-10 in Last 33, Phillies Staring at the Gap

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
57-44. No. 1 NL Wild Card.

The Cubs are 23-10 over their last 33 games and still playing with a chip on their shoulder. Phillies are one back. Cardinals are five back and fading.

12 days to the deadline. Hoyer has leverage. Use it.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB
